name: Lynas Rare Earths Limited
description: Lynas Rare Earths Limited is the world’s only significant producer of separated rare earth materials outside of China. The company operates the high-grade Mt Weld mine in Western Australia, one of the world's premier rare earths deposits, and a major chemical processing plant in Kuantan, Malaysia. Lynas provides a sustainable and reliable supply of high-quality rare earth products, including Neodymium and Praseodymium (NdPr), which are essential for high-performance magnets used in electric vehicles, wind turbines, and advanced electronics, supporting the global transition to green energy and digital technologies.
